title: jasminum nummulariifolium var. meridionale
intro: Jasminum nummulariifolium var. meridionale, also known as the Southern Coin Jasmine, is a fragrant, flowering plant species that belongs to the olive family (Oleaceae). The plant is known for its traditional use in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Jasminum nummulariifolium var. meridionale include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, while also having antioxidant and anti-aging properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
